title: DNA extraction for fermented plant based foods
author: Anique Ahmad

steps_raw.instruction: Secure in a Omni Bead Ruptor Elite bead beater fitted with a 2 ml tube holder assembly and process at max speed (30 m/s) for 00:05:00 . Rest for 00:05:00 .
Centrifuge the ZR BashingBeadâ„˘ Lysis Tubes (0.1 & 0.5 mm) in a microcentrifuge at â‰Ą 10000 x g, Â°C, 1 minute .
Transfer up to 600 ÂµL supernatant to the Zymo-Spinâ„˘ III-F Filter in the labelled Collection Tube and centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the Zymo-Spinâ„˘ III-F Filter.
Add 600 ÂµL of ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ DNA Binding Buffer to the filtrate in the labelled Collection Tube from Step 4. Mix well.
Repeat Step 5 so that the final volume of ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ DNA Binding Buffer added is 1200 ÂµL .
Transfer 800 ÂµL of the mixture from Step 5 to a Zymo-Spinâ„˘ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .
Discard the flow through from the Collection Tube and repeat Step 6.
Add 400 ÂµL ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ DNA Wash Buffer 1 to the Zymo-Spinâ„˘ IICR Column in a new Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.
Add 700 ÂµL ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the Zymo-Spinâ„˘ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute . Discard the flow-through.
Repeat with 200 ÂµL ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ DNA Wash Buffer 2 to the Zymo-Spinâ„˘ IICR Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute .

Transfer the Zymo-Spinâ„˘ IICR Column to a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and add 100 ÂµL (50 Âµl minimum) ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ DNase/RNase Free Water directly to the column matrix and incubate for 00:05:00 . Centrifuge at 10.000 x g, , 1 minute to elute the DNA
The filtered DNA is now suitable for PCR and other downstream applications. Eluted DNA should be frozen (â€“30 to â€“15Â°C or â€“90 to â€“65Â°C)
Place a Zymo-Spinâ„˘ III-HRC Filter in a new Collection Tube and add 600 ÂµL ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ HRC Prep Solution. Centrifuge at 8.000 x g, , 3 minutes .
Transfer the eluted DNA (Step 10) to a prepared Zymo-Spinâ„˘ III-HRC Filter in a clean 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and centrifuge at exactly 16.000 x g, , 3 minutes .

Take 250 mg of food sample while on dry ice and transfer to mortar. Add liquid nitrogen until food sample is completely immersed. Using pestle vigorously homogenize sample until a powder forms. Transfer all of the sample to a ZR BashingBeadâ„˘ Lysis Tube (0.1 & 0.5 mm) . Add 750 ÂµL ZymoBIOMICSâ„˘ Lysis Solution to the tube. Cap tightly.
